revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-230

the angle of uncertainty is the region where the colour and/or the flash rhythm change and where the resulting colour of the light is mixed/affected by two colours, or showing fading intensity due to a blanking screen.


[[Image:Angle Of Uncertainty 2023.png|400px|border]]
